Acolyte.name: 侍僧 Acolyte
Acolyte.description:
你曾是一个有信仰的人。你学会了如何无私地生活，为他人服务，或追求更高的理念。

You were a person of faith. You learned how to live selflessly in service to others or in pursuit of a higher ideal.

Constable.name: 警员 Constable
Constable.description:
你曾是执法组织的一员。你学会了如何对周遭环境保持警觉，在复杂的社交结构中行事，并展现出一种令人畏惧的气势。

You were part of a law enforcement organization. You learned how to remain vigilant to your surroundings, work within complex social structures, and affect an imposing presence.

Merchant.name: 商人 Merchant
Merchant.description:
你曾是一名四处奔波的推销员，或经营着一家小店。你花费了大量时间学习与各行各业的人谈判的艺术，以及最佳交易的底线所在。

You were a travelling salesperson or tended a small shop. You spent a significant portion of your time learning the art of negotiation with people from all walks of life, and where the boundaries of the best deal lay.

Performer.name: 表演者 Performer
Performer.description:
你曾是一名巡回艺人。你学会了从容参加各种社交场合，懂得如何迎合观众，通过润饰你表演中的细节来引发特定的情绪反应。
You were a travelling entertainer. You learned to be comfortable attending a variety of social functions, how to play to your audience, embellishing details of your performance to evoke particular emotional responses.

Physician.name: 医师 Physician
Physician.description:
你曾是某种类型的治疗者或医疗专业人士。你一生中有一段时间都在学习医学科学，而且你很擅长注意到他人的病症。你知道如何治疗创伤、疾病，以及如何鉴定它们的源头。

You were a healer or medical professional of some variety. You have spent a portion of your life learning medical science, and you have a propensity for noticing illness in others. You know how to treat wounds, diseases, and how to identify their sources.

Scholar.name: 学者 Scholar
Scholar.description:
你总是在图书馆或教室里最能感到自在。你的学习专注于揭开你周围世界的奥秘，而你几乎已经熟悉所有理论性学科。

You were always most at home in a library or classroom. Your studies focused on unravelling the mysteries of the world around you, and there are few theoretical subjects with which you are not already familiar.

Soldier.name: 士兵 Soldier
Soldier.description:
你曾是某种军事组织中的一名普通成员。纪律让你得以生存，并强调了向他人展现力量与支配地位的重要性，而多年的骑马或行军经历也教会了你如何应对各种地形。

You were a rank-and-file member of a military organization of some variety. Discipline made you a survivor and emphasized the importance of demonstrating strength and dominance over others, and years on horseback or marching taught you how to handle all manner of terrain.

Urchin.name: 街头流浪儿 Urchin
Urchin.description:
很少有人能像你那样学会生存。你所受的是一场关于不信任的残酷教育。你学会了观察他人身上危险或不忠的明显迹象，避开他人的注意，在某个庞大都市的街头捡拾残羹剩饭果腹。

Few learn to survive the way you did. Yours was a harsh education in distrust. You learned to watch others for the telltale signs of danger or disloyalty, to avoid the attention of others, scavenging for scraps of food on the streets of some urban sprawl.

Wanderer.name: 流浪者 Wanderer
Wanderer.description:
你过着漂泊不定的生活。对你来说，没有什么比身下是马车或坐骑、看着异乡的天空在头顶缓缓掠过更令人享受的了。你学会了仔细留意周遭环境及其需求，照料你所依赖的生物，并利用手头能找到的东西将就度日。

Yours has been an itinerant life. You enjoy nothing more than the feeling of a cart or mount below you, watching some foreign sky slowly pass above you. You learned to pay careful attention to your surroundings and their needs, to tend the creatures on which you rely, and to make do with what you can find.
